specs.title: cp-000: Without modelearn the page defaults to Write mode
cp-001: Left sidebar title input initializes from docTitle returned by useStudioDocument
cp-002: Title input has no placeholder in the current implementation
cp-003: Typing in the title immediately updates local input state and sets save status t
cp-004: Title saves are debounced by 1 second in useStudioDocument
cp-005: Successful title saves set save status to saved and refresh lastSavedAt
cp-006: Failed title saves set save status to error without showing an inline toast
cp-007: Project selector is hidden entirely when the user has 0 or 1 projects
cp-008: Project selector button falls back to Select project when no selected project ma
cp-009: Project selector closes when clicking outside because it listens on mousedown
cp-010: Selecting the already-active project is a no-op in selectProject
cp-011: Selecting a different project clears initialContent clears document resets save
cp-012: Initial document load calls loadStudioDocumentinitialProjectId once on mount
cp-013: If loadStudioDocument returns no document the editor area shows Failed to load o
cp-014: Successful document load sets docTitle selectedProjectId and initialContent from
cp-015: Document loading state shows a spinner plus Loading document
cp-016: Document error state shows a warning icon plus the error string from the hook
cp-017: Save indicator saving state uses a spinning CircleNotch icon plus Saving
cp-018: Save indicator saved state uses CloudCheck when status is explicitly saved
cp-019: Save indicator idle state with lastSavedAt uses a Check icon and the same Saved
cp-020: Save indicator unsaved state uses a non-spinning CircleNotch icon plus Unsaved c
cp-021: Save indicator error state uses a Warning icon plus Save failed
cp-022: Save indicator shows an empty span when status is idle and there is no lastSaved
cp-023: Typing inside the editor triggers handleDirty before the debounced DB save fires
cp-024: handleDirty writes a fallback draft into localStorage under scholarsync_studio_d
cp-025: Local draft payload includes content plainText wordCount timestamp and title
cp-026: Local draft write failures are swallowed silently
cp-027: Debounced content saves send documentId title editor_content plain_text_content
cp-028: Successful content saves can set activeSectionId if one was not known yet
cp-029: Content-save failures log Auto-save failed to the console and set save status to
cp-030: Left sidebar always shows Current Draft as the active nav item and it is not cli
cp-031: My Library nav link points to library
cp-032: Literature Search nav link points to research
cp-033: References header count is the full referencessize from the reference store
